title: COPY INTO table (column1, column2) got wrong result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (f1 Int32, f2 Int32, f3 String, f4 Date DEFAULT today());
INSERT INTO t (f1, f2, f3) VALUES (1, 2, 'test1');
INSERT INTO t (f1, f2, f3) VALUES (NULL, 3, 'test2');
INSERT INTO t (f1, f2, f3) VALUES (4, NULL, 'test3');
SELECT * FROM t WHERE f2 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: COPY INTO with specified columns returns incorrect results
